string.text: Replacement and processing of the barrel, and also some other mechanisms of flue allows to raise an initial speed and fly-distance of bullet.
Usage of special accessories, special trunks and magnetic compensators helps to stabilize the flight of bullets and raise accuracy.
Replacement of gunstock, installation of compensators and gun-tuning special for gunslinger reduce the impact as result.
The improvement of reliability by the way of replacement some details of weapon on more qualitative analogues which can help prolong the weapon’s lifespan.
Installing of extended mags, twin pumps and hand-made clips can increase the number of rounds to get into the magazine.
A process of replacement of some parts of the weapon for modern lightweight alternatives, allowing to make it lighter weight while keeping its reliability at the same level.
Further refinement and replacement of springs, installation of auxiliary coils and removing constraints allows slightly increase rate of fire.
